title: croton quisumbingianus
intro: Croton quisumbingianus, also known as the Filipino croton, is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton quisumbingianus include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a remedy for wounds and insect bites. The plant's leaves and stems are commonly used in herbal preparations, which can be taken as tea or applied topically in the form of a poultice or ointment.
